message:
fix(mux): preserve split layout on server for proper restore

When splitting a panel, the client was sending CREATE_PANEL which
caused the server to create a new tab instead of tracking the split.
This caused split panes to become separate tabs after page reload.

Changes:
- Add SPLIT_PANEL (0x22) message to panel WebSocket protocol
- Client sends SPLIT_PANEL with parent panel ID and direction
- Server creates new panel as split of parent, preserving layout tree
- WebSocket connection properly associated with split panel for streaming
- Add lastCodec tracking for video decoder reconfiguration on resize
- Remove deprecated JSON/binary split_panel handlers from control WS
